title: genista sericea subsp. sericea
intro: Genista sericea subsp. sericea, also known as the downy broom or broom heath, is a shrub species in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Genista sericea subsp. sericea can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which have been used to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it as a treatment.
